case.title: YALE TRANSPORT CORP. v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: YALE TRANSPORT CORP. v. UNITED STATES, 365 U.S. 566 (1961)
opinion.h4: YALE TRANSPORT CORP. ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 584. Decided March 20, 1961.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Acting Assistant Attorney General Kirkpatrick, Richard A. Solomon, Robert W. Ginnane and H. Neil Garson for the United States and the Interstate Commerce Commission, and Bernard G. Segal, Irving R. Segal and S. Harrison Kahn for United Parcel Service, Inc., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
MR. JUSTICE BLACK is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
365 U.S. 566 BURD v. WILKINS, WARDEN. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE SECOND CIRCUIT. No. 716, Misc. Decided March 20, 1961.
